About AI Oracle

AI Oracle is committed to building the next-generation trusted data infrastructure. Through AI-enhanced AI Oracle technology, we provide Web3 ecosystems with trusted on-chain solutions for real-world data. We combine hardware security modules and AI anomaly detection to ensure full-process trust from data collection to on-chain storage.

Our Mission

Build a trusted bridge between the real world and blockchain, enabling physical world data to enter Web3 ecosystems in a verifiable and immutable manner. Drive large-scale implementation of RWA, supply chain finance, and compliance auditing scenarios, providing transparent and efficient data infrastructure globally.

Technical Advantages

Combining cutting-edge technologies including Hardware Security Modules (HSM), AI anomaly detection, Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKP), and Merkle anchoring, we ensure full-process trust from data collection, transmission to on-chain storage, providing financial-grade security for enterprise applications. Every data point is traceable and verifiable.

Core Values

We are committed to solving three core challenges of bringing real-world data on-chain, ensuring data authenticity, certainty, and security through innovative technology

Data Authenticity

Hardware signing at device level + AI anomaly detection ensure data source credibility from the origin, preventing fake data injection

On-Chain Certainty

Verifiable timestamps and Merkle anchoring technology ensure immutability of on-chain data process, facilitating audit replay

Security

Military-grade AES-256 encryption and multi-signature verification mechanism ensure absolute security of data transmission and storage

Industry Solutions

Serving enterprises across industries, empowering digital transformation and on-chain solutions

Smart Agriculture

Real-time monitoring of soil moisture, temperature, lighting and other agricultural production data, enabling precision agriculture, increasing yield, reducing risks, and achieving digital and intelligent agricultural production management.

Cold Chain Logistics

Full-process monitoring of temperature, humidity, location data, ensuring safe transportation of temperature-controlled goods like fresh food and pharmaceuticals, providing immutable transportation proof, ensuring food and drug safety.

Manufacturing

Real-time on-chain recording of equipment status, production output, quality inspection data, achieving transparent production processes, improving production efficiency, reducing equipment failure rates, enabling smart manufacturing.

Smart Energy

Monitoring power generation, consumption, carbon emissions and other energy data, optimizing energy management, achieving carbon neutrality goals, and promoting green energy development.

Smart Logistics

Full tracking of cargo location, temperature, vibration and other data, providing complete logistics traceability chain, reducing cargo damage rate, improving logistics efficiency and transparency.

Construction Engineering

Monitoring construction progress, material usage, safety indicators and other data, achieving transparent construction management, reducing project risks, and improving project delivery quality.

Partners

Partnering with global leading enterprises to build trusted data ecosystem

Core Team

Core advisors and experts across RWA, blockchain, AI, and industrial digital transformation.

VL
Vincent Lee

Co-founder of Hong Kong RWA Global Industry Alliance and Chairman of Fortune Link Holdings. With over 20 years of experience in AI, Blockchain, and IoT, he previously led national-level research projects at Dalian Maritime University. He holds nearly 20 patents and is the author of RWA: Restructuring Financial Business Models.

AD
Aliks Dou

Executive Secretary-General of the Blockchain Committee of China Communications Industry Association and Founder of the Hong Kong RWA Global Industry Alliance. A leading expert in digital economy and industrial transformation, he spearheaded the compilation of the General Standards for Digital Collections.

KV
Kevin

Deputy Director of the Blockchain Committee of China Communications Industry Association and a key advisor for MIIT and various municipal governments on Metaverse and Blockchain. He is a pioneer of the "Chain Reform" initiative and an expert in the integration of culture and technology.

DT
Dachao Tian

Founder of Lianshan Capital and VP of the Shanghai Blockchain Association.

AK
Aditya Kumar

Lead Developer Relations Engineer specializing in Web3 x AI Ecosystem Strategy.

IS
Ishant Singh

AI Product Leader (Ex-OpenAI, Amazon) and Startup Advisor.

Latest News

Stay updated with AI Oracle's latest developments

Funding2025-01

AI Oracle Completes Series A Funding

Secured investment from renowned institutions including Sequoia China and Matrix Partners, raising $10 million for technology R&D and global market expansion.

Case Study2024-12

Successfully Deployed Southeast Asia Cold Chain Project

Providing full-process temperature control data on-chain service for Southeast Asia's largest cold chain logistics company, covering 200+ refrigerated vehicles, ensuring food safety traceability.

Certification2024-11

AI Oracle Receives Series A Funding

Passed national MIIT data security and privacy protection certification, becoming one of the first certified Web3 data service providers, demonstrating technical excellence.

Real-Time Data Monitoring

Taking an agricultural demonstration park in Jiangsu as an example, displaying real-time sensor data and on-chain confirmation status (updated every 5 minutes, blockchain transactions queryable)
